title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.760 - Insurance carriers exempt from other tax, when
text:
287.760.  Insurance carriers exempt from other tax, when. — Any insurance carrier, foreign or domestic, liable to pay a tax upon its premiums or deposits under this chapter shall not be liable to pay any other or further tax upon such premiums or deposits under any other law of this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 3762, A. 1949 S.B. 1103) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 3372
